---
title: "Assignment1"
author: Shenyu He 36032026
format:
  html: 
   toc: true
  pdf: 
   toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false 
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(knitr)
```

## Introduction
The purchase amount of consumers greatly affects the profitability and development of the company. As the supervisor of the company, I need to consider whether the company's marketing activities play a role in promoting the purchase amount of consumers across different customers and provide data support for the company's decision-making.

## Research question
In this research, I will focus on the variables between "marketing_spend" and "purchase amount" to find out their relationship, I will also consider the impact of different types of consumers and the purchase amount.
